recommendations.title: Whore
recommendations.overview: This melodrama investigates the life of a sex worker, in a pseudo-documentary style.

recommendations.title: Billion Dollar Brain
recommendations.overview: A former British spy stumbles into in a plot to overthrow Communism with the help of a supercomputer. But who is working for whom?

recommendations.title: The Devils
recommendations.overview: A charismatic 17th-century French priest becomes the target of a sexually obsessed nun’s witchcraft accusations, which corrupt church and state officials are all too happy to exploit.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

recommendations.title: The Lair of the White Worm
recommendations.overview: When an archaeologist uncovers a strange skull in a foreign land, the residents of a nearby town begin to disappear, leading to further inexplicable occurrences.

recommendations.title: Tommy
recommendations.overview: After a series of traumatic childhood events, a psychosomatically deaf, dumb and blind boy becomes a master pinball player and the object of a religious cult.

recommendations.title: Women in Love
recommendations.overview: Growing up in the sheltered confines of a 1920s English coal-mining community, free-spirited sisters Gudrun and Ursula explore erotic love with a wealthy playboy and a philosophical educator, with cataclysmic results for all four.

recommendations.title: Gothic
recommendations.overview: Living on an estate on the shores of Lake Geneva, Lord Byron is visited by Percy and Mary Shelley. Together with Byron's lover Claire Clairmont, and aided by hallucinogenic substances, they devise an evening of ghoulish tales. However, when confronte

recommendations.title: Crimes of Passion
recommendations.overview: Fashion designer Joanna Crane leads a double life. By night she is China Blue, a prostitute who's attracted the attention of a sexually frustrated private detective, and a psychopathic priest in possession of a murderous sex toy.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Whip It
recommendations.overview: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.
